title: Summary: Turn 989
content: Created 4 test files (NotionExtractionSupportTest, RawContentMediaTextExtractionServiceTest, HeuristicTextKnowledgeExtractionServiceTest, JsonFileKnowledgeBaseStoreTest) for untested services (46 source, 8 existing tests). Fixed `ObsidianExportCommand.java` compile error. Remaining: fix compile errors in `JsonFileKnowledgeBaseStoreTest.java` (Snapshot import, RelationType.RELATED_TO) and two `InferenceConfig` constructor calls in `KnowledgeBaseTest.java`.
